title: ASR Outdoor 3lb Paydirt Backpack Gold Panning Kit Mini Auminum Sluice Box, 15pc
description:
We’ve paired one of our most popular gold panning backpack kits with a 3lbs bag of Bobby Bo paydirt, meaning you can practice and enhance gold panning and sluice box techniques at home, before taking to the field. And, while this gold panning kit is intended for travel (all the gold prospecting equipment included in this gold panning kit fit inside the drawstring backpack), the included bag of paydirt provides the opportunity to develop and hone fine gold recovery skills in preparation for a day at the claim site.

The 3lbs bag of Bobby Bo intermediate unclassified paydirt means classification work is required, as well as the removal of heavier magnetic materials like black sand and other unwanted organic matter

ASR Outdoor 3lb Paydirt Backpack Gold Panning Kit Mini Auminum Sluice Box, 15pc

MSRP 129.99

ASR Outdoor

We’ve paired one of our most popular gold panning backpack kits with a 3lbs bag of Bobby Bo paydirt, meaning you can practice and enhance gold panning and sluice box techniques at home, before taking to the field. And, while this gold panning kit is intended for travel (all the gold prospecting equipment included in this gold panning kit fit inside the drawstring backpack), the included bag of paydirt provides the opportunity to develop and hone fine gold recovery skills in preparation for a day at the claim site. The 3lbs bag of Bobby Bo intermediate unclassified paydirt means classification work is required, as well as the removal of heavier magnetic materials like black sand and other unwanted organic matter. On the gold recovery front, this kit offers both panning or sluicing options; choose from either 10 inch or 12 inch dual riffle gold pans, or mini rubber sluice box! A great method for fine gold recovery alongside gold panning, the mini aluminum sluice box measures 12 inches with no assembly required; aluminum sluice box features V Shaped ribbed rubber sluice box matting, proven to efficiently trap gold. All gold mining tools included in this gold panning kit covers you from start to finish in the gold recovery process, from processing and classification to retrieval and storage. Gold prospecting equipment includes: scoop, 1/30 classifier screen, and x2 dual riffle gold pans, mini sluice box, 8lbs magnetic classifier, scoop, magnifying tweezers, sniffer bottle, pipettes, drawstring backpack, paydirt and glass storage vials. Lightweight and compact, this gold panning kit is great for fine gold recovery work at home, but is also ideal for evaluating onsite paydirt concentrate, or for hiking into remote claim sites locations where limited equipment is the only option. The kit also makes a great gift for new gold panning hobbyists, for packing with your camping gear or as a fun activity to do with kids. Good luck!

Product Details

MPN: SON
UPC:
Features: GOLD PANNING KIT WITH PAYDIRT: 3lbs bag of unclassified gold pay dirt paired with our popular lightweight backpack gold panning kit, means you can practice and enhance gold panning and sluice box techniques at home before taking to the field
3LB GOLD PAYDIRT: Total weight is 3 pounds of unclassified paydirt filled with coarse gold flakes and fine flower gold. Black sand and larger raw material is present; working through this paydirt is a surefire way to develop gold panning and sluicing skills without needing to be on site
PORTABLE SLUICE BOX: Mini aluminum sluice box features V Shaped ribbed rubber sluice box matting, proven to efficiently trap gold; And, weighing in at just 0.60lbs, this compact sluice box is easy to pack and carry with other gold prospecting equipment
TRAVEL BACKPACK: Drawstring backpack fits all gold prospecting equipment, making this gold panning kit ideal for evaluating onsite paydirt concentrate, for hiking into remote claim sites locations or for enhancing gold panning techniques at home; great gift for new gold panning hobbyists!
GOLD PANNING KIT INCLUDES: x2 dual riffle gold pans, mini sluice box, 1/30 mini classifier screen, 8lbs magnetic classifier, scoop, magnifying tweezers, sniffer bottle, pipettes, backpack, paydirt, glass vials
